chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1284 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing on Misc. No.6700/2017 3. For hearing of main case 28.03.2025 Mr. Atir Aqeel Ansari, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Javed Ali Sangi, advocate for respondent-SRB Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Essentially the petition has assailed an order-in-original directly in writ jurisdiction of this court. While the petitioner remained at liberty to escalate its grievance in the statutory remedial hierarchy no case could be articulated for approaching the court in writ jurisdiction directly. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
